description: CompositionWhite string bikini made of poly-cotton no hole plated mesh fabric, has a durable signature logo centered waistband, reinforced fabric covered rubber leg bands, contrast stithc detailing and printed label on the innerFittingLow riseWash careMachine wash warm at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowDry cleanableThis low-rise tanga cut bikini from facit is crafted using poly-cotton mesh fabric that provides quick dry comfort.
